info.title: Uber Eats Marketplace Promotions API
info.description:
The Promotions API allows you to create, read and delete promotions from an Uber Eats storefront.

For API testing via Postman, ensure your application's scopes are approved, and then click [here](https://god.gw.postman.com/run-collection/29024134-0c75b446-ad57-4c4f-8484-808de20735a4?action=collection%2Ffork&source=rip_markdown&collection-url=entityId%3D29024134-0c75b446-ad57-4c4f-8484-808de20735a4%26entityType%3Dcollection%26workspaceId%3De5995580-1109-4772-a883-92e9531beae5#?env%5BUber%20Eats%20Marketplace%20API%) to fork the collection.

# Table of contents
- [Create Promotion](#create-promotion)
- [Revoke Promotion](#revoke-promotion)
- [Get Promotion](#get-promotion)
- [Get Promotions](#get-promotions)

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: Create single promotion by specifying the store ID (Uber UUID)

promotion_id.description: Unique identifier of the promotion, generated by Uber

post.description: Revoke promotion by specifying the promotion ID

parameters.name: promotion_id
parameters.description: Revoke single promotion by specifying the promotion ID

get.description:
Get single promotion metadata by specifying the promotion ID.\
**Note:** The Get Promotion endpoint will only return promotions that have been created by our external API. Promotions created from within a merchant's management portal will not be contained in the response.

parameters.name: promotion_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for a given promotion. This is the identifier that is expected to be quoted for support queries and is otherwise known as the ‘promotion id’.

200.description: Promotion data for singular promotion by promotion ID

get.description:
Provides a list of all promotions existing on a store filtered on state and time range.\
**Note:** The Get Promotions endpoint will only return promotions that have been created by our external API. Promotions created from within a merchant's management portal will not be contained in the response.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for a given store. This is the identifier that is expected to be quoted for support queries and is otherwise known as the 'store id'.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Optional. If it is specified, the result will only contain the promotions with target state.

parameters.name: time_range
parameters.description: Optional.  The time_range provides a filter to enable only returning promotions live in a certain time window.

promotion_id.description: Unique identifier of the promotion, generated by Uber

store_id.description: Unique identifier of the store that the promotion is tied to

promotion_id.description: Unique identifier of the promotion, generated by Uber

store_id.description: Unique identifier of the store that the promotion is tied to

promotion_id.description: Unique identifier of the promotion, generated by Uber

store_id.description: Unique identifier of the store that the promotion is tied to

promotion_id.description: Unique identifier of the promotion, generated by Uber

store_id.description: Unique identifier of the store that the promotion is tied to

promotion_id.description: Unique identifier of the promotion, generated by Uber

store_id.description: Unique identifier of the store that the promotion is tied to

promotion_id.description: Unique identifier of the promotion, generated by Uber

store_id.description: Unique identifier of the store that the promotion is tied to

promotion_discount.description: Contains information about the Promotion Discount.
Contains information about the Promotion Discount.
Contains information about the Promotion Discount.
Contains information about the Promotion Discount.
Contains information about the Promotion Discount.

flat_off_promotion_type.description: The promotion type for the flat off promotion.

free_item_promotion_type.description: The promotion type for the free item with minimum spend promotion.

bogo_promotion_type.description: The promotion type for the BOGO promotion.

percent_off_promotion_type.description: The promotion type for the Percent-Off promotion.

menu_item_discount_promotion_type.description: The promotion type for the Menu Item Discount promotion.

free_delivery_promotion_type.description: The promotion type for the Free Delivery promotion.

external_promotion_id.description: This is the external partner's promotion ID string for reference. For example, "Uber_Superbowl".

allow_unlimited_apply.description: Set true if allows the same users to redeem multiple times when the promotion is active

money.description: The money representation of a charge or discount part.

amount.description: The amount of money. Please note, that an amount of 50 and a currency code of USD represents 50 pennies, since a penny is the smallest unit of currency in USD. For example, 2000 in US is 20 USD.

currency_code.description: ISO 4217 code for the currency(i.e, USD, CAD). This field is not required when creat promotion, and the query promotion reuslt will show it as reference.

unlimited_budget.description: Set true if budget is unlimited and leave budget_amount empty. Default is false, and budget_amount needs to be set.

periodic_budget.description: Set this to specify periodic budget for promotion.

time_range.description: Time range is used as optional filter to query promotion list

start_time.description: fetch promos still live after this time

end_time.description: fetch promos that stop prior to this time

promo_type.description: Promotion type. Please see more details in the corresponding discount types

min_basket_constraint.description: The minimum pre-tax subtotal requirement to redeem the promotion

flat_off_discount.description: When promo_type is "FLATOFF", please fill details for flat off discount (“Spend $x, Save $y”) in this discount object.

free_item_discount.description: When promo_type is "FREEITEM_MINBASKET", please fill details for free item discount (“Spend $x, Get y for free”) in this discount object.

bogo_discount.description: When promo_type is "BOGO", please fill details for BOGO discount (“Buy 1, get 1 free”) in this discount object.

percent_off_discount.description: When promo_type is "PERCENTOFF", please fill details for Percent-Off discount (“Spend $30, Get 30% off on the entire basket up to $20”) in this discount object.

percent_value.description: The percentage value of the discount. For example, 30 for 30% off.

menu_item_discount.description: When promo_type is "MENU_ITEM_DISCOUNT", please fill details for Menu Item Discount (“30% off on CHICKEN_NUGGETS and 20% off on CURLY_FRIES”) in this discount object.

promotion_customization.description: Fill the fields here for providing promotion customization options. Example, custom schedule for promotion, Happy Hour promotion and UBER_ONE promotion.

custom_schedule_object.description: Fill this to specify custom schedule constraints for promotion.

daypart_constraints_list.description: List of day-part constraints for promotion.

daypart_constraint_object.description: Fill this to day-part constraints for promotion.

hours.description: List of time interval for day-part constraints

day_of_week_list.description: List of days for day-part constraints. Allowed Values [MONDAY, TUESDAY, WEDNESDAY, THURSDAY, FRIDAY, SATURDAY, SUNDAY]

start_hour.description: Start hour for time interval. Allowed Values [0 -23].

start_minute.description: Start minute for time interval. Allowed Values [0 - 59].

end_hour.description: End hour for time interval. Allowed Values [0 - 24].

end_minute.description: End minute for time interval. Allowed Values [0 - 59]. If end_hour = 24, then end_minute must be 0 (i.e., exactly midnight).

free_items.description: List of free items in "FREE_ITEM" promotion. Currently, we only support one free item per promotion.

free_item_id_object.description: The External ID of the item for free. If you want to set up free-item only for certain option of the item (i.e, "Buy $15, Get 8-pieces chicken nuggets for free", instead of 12 or 6 pieces options on chicken nuggets product page), and then you need to use that the external ID of specific option.

free_item_id.description: The External ID of the item for free

target_items.description: List of target items in "BOGO" promotion.

item_discounts.description: List of item discounts in "MENU_ITEM_DISCOUNT" promotion.

item_id_object.description: The External ID of the item.

item_external_id.description: The External ID of the item

item_discount_object.description: The discount details for item in MENU_ITEM_DISCOUNT promotion.

discount_amount.description: The discount amount details for item.

percent_value.description: The percentage value of the discount. For example, 30 for 30% off.

state.description: Six available states for promotions (active, pending, completed, revoked, expired, deleted).

user_group.description: Distinguishes the user type. If FIRST_TIME_CUSTOMERS is selected, then the promotion can only be viewed by users who have never placed any order in this store.

budget_period.description: Distinguishes the budget period. Only 'WEEKLY' budget period is supported for now

marketing_experience_type.description: The marketing experience type for the promotion. If HAPPY_HOUR is selected, then the promotion can only be viewed by users during the happy hour period (2:00 PM - 5:00 PM). As of now, the HAPPY_HOUR market experience type is only supported for promotions of type "PERCENTOFF". Other promotion types are not compatible with this experience.

engagement_campaign_type.description: The engagement campaign type for the promotion. If UBER_ONE_OFFERS is selected, then the promotion will be applicable for only Uber-One members.

day_of_week.description: Day of the week for day-part constraints. Allowed Values [MONDAY, TUESDAY, WEDNESDAY, THURSDAY, FRIDAY, SATURDAY, SUNDAY]

metadata.description: Error message not standardized. Application code will provide contextual error message​

error_response.description: Payload returned for unsuccessful API transactions.

message.example: Invalid OAuth 2.0 credentials provided. | Error message not standardized. Application code will provide contextual error message.

start_time.description: Start time of merchant UTC time in the format of RFC-3339

end_time.description: End time of merchant UTC time in the format of RFC-3339

created_time.description: Created time of merchant UTC time in the format of RFC-3339

currency_code.description: The currency in which the order has taken place.

auth.description: This API uses OAuth 2 with the implicit grant flow. [More info](https://developer.uber.com/docs/eats/guides/authentication)

scopes.eats.store: Indicates a token has permission to update and retrieve store and menu information.
scopes.eats.store.promotion.read: Indicates a token has permission to read promotions.
scopes.eats.store.promotion.write: Indicates a token has permission to create or revoke promotions.
scopes.eats.pos_provisioning: Indicates a token has permission to setup/remove pos integration and retrieve stores.
